title: Swinney Seeks UK Meeting Over US Military Use of Prestwick Airport

sections.heading: Call for Meeting
sections.content: Economy Secretary John Swinney has requested a meeting with UK officials regarding the military use of Prestwick Airport by American forces.

sections.heading: Military Refuelling Operations
sections.content: Reports indicate that three US military refuelling aircraft that have previously utilised Prestwick Airport are involved in operations supporting airstrikes by the US and Israel.

sections.heading: Concerns Raised
sections.content: Swinney’s request comes amid concerns about the implications of foreign military operations being conducted from UK facilities.

sourceReferences.citationText: bbc-scotland – Swinney seeks UK meeting over US military use of Prestwick Airport
